title: daphne haoi
intro: Daphne haoi, also known as Chinese daphne or Daphne genkwa, is a shrub native to China that belongs to the thymelaeaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its active compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Daphne haoi has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, sore throat, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Daphne haoi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
